subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath been made manifest is verily the resplendent Sun risen from this horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لهو الشمس المشرقه من افق هذه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as sun
